comments.author: @calledisrael434
comments.text: The  over 50,000 year old Aboriginal people of Australia are the oldest continuous civilisation in the world - a treasure to respect & preserve!! This country's old Peoples is a  blessing to humanity often abused & neglected  sadly ....as a Jew I recognise their monumental age with awe!.....Baruch Hashem to them ....Shalom....old Messianic Jew.

comments.author: @greghutchison9915
comments.text: Its not pronounced Bondy. Its pronounced Bond Die. Similarly Coogee is pronouced Coog gee. All AI never gets these names rtight. You need real people
